CommitBackupJob.description: Grants permission to commit backup job

DescribeBackupJob.description: Grants permission to describe backup job

GetBaseBackup.description: Grants permission to get base backup

GetChunk.description: Grants permission to get data from a recovery point for a restore job

GetIncrementalBaseBackup.description: Grants permission to get incremental base backup

GetObjectMetadata.description: Grants permission to get metadata from a recovery point for a restore job

ListChunks.description: Grants permission to list data from a recovery point for a restore job

ListObjects.description: Grants permission to list data from a recovery point for a restore job

MountCapsule.description: Associates a KMS key to a backup vault

NotifyObjectComplete.description: Grants permission to mark an uploaded data as completed for a backup job

PutChunk.description: Grants permission to upload data to an AWS Backup-managed recovery point for a backup job

StartObject.description: Grants permission to upload data to an AWS Backup-managed recovery point for a backup job

UpdateObjectComplete.description: Grants permission to update object complete
